nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Guide to the retrieval-evaluation harness: explains the frozen golden set, corpus provenance/disclosure, how to run eval_retrieval.py, and the real-document and chunk-hygiene e2e proofs that gate the enrichment overhaul's definition of done.
nodes.languageNotes: Documents a measurement-first workflow: a frozen golden set must be authored and locked before recording a baseline so scores aren't chased.

nodes.name: RETRIEVAL_LOG.md
nodes.summary: Append-only score log recording retrieval quality (recall@5/@10, MRR) on the frozen golden set across milestones; contains a mock-embedder wiring check and a pending real-embedder baseline that the enrichment overhaul must beat.

nodes.name: e2e_queries.yaml
nodes.summary: Frozen golden query set for the real-document e2e test, pairing natural-language queries (categorized as lexical/prose/cross-reference) with expected docs and breadcrumb sections across GitLab, Azure, rcherara, and RetailNexus corpora.

nodes.name: e2e_sources.yaml
nodes.summary: Manifest of real public architecture documents for the e2e test, listing commit-pinned source URLs plus license/attribution notes; consumed by fetch_e2e_corpus.py to download docs on demand without redistributing content.

nodes.name: queries.yaml
nodes.summary: Frozen retrieval golden set authored against the eval corpus before any enrichment change, mapping cross-reference/paraphrase/lexical-control queries to expected docs and sections so the baseline measurement stays honest.
